mapper.sql: id, username, phone, email, password_hash, avatar_url, bio, gender, birthday, location, status, role, is_muted, muted_reason, muted_at, mute_end_time, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.phone, u.email, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.gender, u.birthday, u.location, u.status, u.role, u.is_muted, u.muted_reason, u.muted_at, u.mute_end_time, u.created_at, u.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE user_id = #{id} AND status = 1) AS post_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows WHERE followee_id = #{id}) AS follower_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{id}) AS following_count, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND followee_id = #{id} ) AS is_followed FROM users u WHERE u.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE users SET is_muted = #{isMuted}, muted_reason = #{mutedReason}, muted_at = #{mutedAt}, mute_end_time = #{muteEndTime} WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE users SET is_muted = 0, muted_reason = NULL, muted_at = NULL, mute_end_time = NULL WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET avatar_url = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE is_muted = 1 AND mute_end_time IS NOT NULL AND mute_end_time <= NOW()

SELECT FROM users WHERE id IN
#{id}
